_comment: Offline failure-context sidecar for the hand-built semconv-defer fixture. During offline replay `gh` is unavailable, so run.sh exposes this at $FIX_CONTEXT_FILE and the /fix skill reads it as the fallback for what it would otherwise self-fetch. This is a SYNTHETIC negative fixture (not a real PR): it simulates a semconv-package version bump that breaks a hand-written attribute reference. The group_label points selection at the otel-core/semconv playbooks; the failing check + log signature ('undefined: semconv.') is what the skill's semconv failure_signature match keys on to classify this as a must-defer semconv migration.
renovate_notes: Semconv package selection is a manual, deliberate migration in this repo; Renovate is configured not to bump it (docs/semantic-conventions.md).
